summary: Iter 184 acceptance-criteria testing — 95% PASS with ONE dead-click bug found in dashboard options audit. (1) LOGIN REDIRECT ✅: admin-pin-login → mode-password → email+sharma123 → lands directly on portal-dashboard-screen at 1920px. (2) DASHBOARD OPTIONS AUDIT — 7/7 clickable KPI cards WORK: pd-kpi-firms→/companies, pd-kpi-present_today→/daily-attendance, pd-kpi-pending_payroll_firms→/compliance-salary-run, pd-kpi-payroll_finalized_firms→/compliance-salary-run, pd-kpi-pending_punch_approvals→/punch-approvals, pd-kpi-pending_tasks→switches to Tasks tab (Iter 184 NEW FIX confirmed working), Monthly Revenue is COMING SOON as expected. ❌ HOWEVER pd-kpi-total_employees routes to /employee-master which is a per-employee DETAIL page (expects ?user_id=) — clicking it lands on 'Missing employee' empty-state screen — DEAD CLICK. Should route to /admin (labelled 'Employee Master Data' in sidebar → Admin Panel with 126 employees, 2 companies). All 8 Quick Actions ✅ (company-register, employee-add, zk-dat-import, compliance-salary-run, challans, labour-reports, punch-approvals, firm-master). All 5 tabs ✅ (overview, tasks, clients, documents, calendar — Client Health testID is pd-tab-clients not pd-tab-client-health). Bell (pd-bell) ✅ opens alerts modal (shows count 7). Refresh (pd-refresh) ✅. Firm chip (pd-firm-chip) ✅ shows 'Kankani Enterprises'. Footer links (View payroll dashboard →, View Calendar, View all) ✅ visible. (3) EMPLOYEE FORM REDESIGN ✅: /employee-add renders 'Add New Employee' premium header with gradient icon chip and 5 SectionHeader components rendered (Identity, Employment, Compliance Salary, Statutory, Family Details). 'Employee Actual Salary' section is conditionally hidden — code confirms it only renders when firm's Offline Salary → Actual Salary Process toggle is ON (employee-add.tsx line 333) — Kankani has it OFF, so hiding is BY DESIGN, not a bug. EDIT MODE ✅ via /employee-add?user_id=user_94e190f2843e: renders 'Employee Details · TNF40186C' header with gradient pencil icon, all fields prefilled (name TEST NF 2244b, mobile +919983872750, email, father TEST FATHER, gender O-, married). No crash. (4) REGRESSION ✅: /pin-login premium design + TEST50/123456 login on Username tab (pin-ident-login_id) → redirects through / → employee home (SURENDRA, ID 50, Kankani); /company-login premium design + 'Employer Sign In' + company-mode-code toggle intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Routes to /employee-master which is a per-employee DETAIL screen (employee-master.tsx line 130 requires ?user_id= param, line 150 sets 'Missing employee' error when absent). Clicking the KPI shows 'Missing employee' empty-state — a DEAD CLICK. This is the exact 'some options not working' bug the user reported. Fix: route to /admin (Employee Master Data Admin Panel, which is the sidebar target for the same label and shows all 126 employees + 2 companies KPIs).

action_items: FIX pd-kpi-total_employees route in /app/frontend/src/components/portal/OverviewPremium.tsx line 102 — change route from '/employee-master' to '/admin' (the actual Employee Master Data list page, per AdminWebShell.tsx line 66). /employee-master is the per-employee detail edit view (expects ?user_id=) and produces a dead-click Missing employee state.

OPTIONAL: fix console noise 'The action REPLACE with payload {name: index} was not handled by any navigator. Do you have a route named index?' — thrown after admin-pin-login on redirect (non-blocking, doesn't affect functionality since dashboard still loads).
critical_code_review_comments: OverviewPremium.tsx line 102: `{ key: 'total_employees', ... route: '/employee-master' }` — route target is a per-employee detail screen, not a list. Should be '/admin'.

employee-add.tsx line 1189: `<SectionHeader icon='cash-outline' title='Employee Actual Salary' tint='#059669' />` renders only when firm's 'Offline Salary / Actual Salary Process' toggle is ON (conditional per comment at line 332-333). For Kankani (toggle OFF) this section is hidden by design — verify with user this is intended.
Iter 184 pending_tasks tab-switch fix works: pd-kpi-pending_tasks click now switches Tasks tab instead of navigating away.

Login redirect path via '/' generates a benign console warning about missing 'index' route in the (tabs) navigator, but end-user redirect completes successfully (both admin → /portal-dashboard and employee → /(tabs)/).

success_rate.frontend: 95% — 7/8 KPI cards work, 8/8 Quick Actions, 5/5 tabs, bell, refresh, firm chip, footer links, employee-add add+edit premium form, /pin-login + /company-login regression all pass. Only pd-kpi-total_employees is a dead click.

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing test employee user_94e190f2843e (TEST NF 2244b, TNF40186C, Kankani QA-SUPER-ITER123 dept) for edit-mode form verification — no data mutated. Did NOT create any TESTQA-ITER184 employee.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 184 acceptance criteria are ~95% met. ONE dead-click remains: pd-kpi-total_employees → /employee-master (detail page, shows Missing employee). Correct route is /admin per sidebar mapping (AdminWebShell.tsx line 66). After main agent fixes OverviewPremium.tsx line 102, quick smoke test: login → dashboard → click Total Employees card → verify lands on /admin Admin Panel showing 126 employees + 2 companies KPIs (not 'Missing employee' error). Login testIDs: mode-password toggle testID='mode-password' (NOT 'admin-mode-password'). Employee login: pin-ident-login_id (Username tab) + pin-phone-input + pin-pin-input, credentials TEST50 / 123456. Client Health tab testID is pd-tab-clients (not pd-tab-client-health). All 8 Quick Action testIDs = pd-qa-{route.slice(1)} e.g. pd-qa-company-register, pd-qa-employee-add etc. All 8 KPI testIDs listed in OverviewPremium.tsx lines 100-108 (key includes firms, total_employees, present_today, pending_payroll_firms, payroll_finalized_firms, pending_punch_approvals, pending_tasks, monthly_revenue).
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE — dead click on pd-kpi-total_employees: OverviewPremium.tsx line 102 sets route='/employee-master', but /app/frontend/app/employee-master.tsx (line 130-152) is a DETAIL/EDIT screen for a specific employee, gated on useLocalSearchParams<{user_id?: string}>().user_id. When invoked without user_id, load() sets err='Missing employee' and shows the empty-state icon. REPRODUCTION: (1) admin-pin-login → mode-password → sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com/sharma123 → portal-dashboard, (2) click any KPI card except Total Employees — works, (3) click Total Employees KPI → screen shows 'Missing employee' warning icon centred, no employees list. MITIGATION: In /app/frontend/src/components/portal/OverviewPremium.tsx line 102, change `route: '/employee-master'` to `route: '/admin'` (the sidebar's 'Employee Master Data' target, verified via AdminWebShell.tsx line 66). /admin renders the Admin Panel with 2 Companies, 126 Employees, Present today, Pending leaves, Open tickets KPIs plus Add employee / Punch approvals / Attendance policy / Biometric devices action cards — matches user intent for 'view all employees under this firm'.
